The '''Haroot''' was an [[Bird/Legends|avian]] [[Species/Legends|species]] indigenous to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Seylott/Legends|Seylott]]. Golden orange in [[Color/Legends|coloration]], they made a distinctive "haroot" call.<ref name="JF" />

{{Creature-stub}}
